criterion_description: At least 5-10 complete Class B event-grade days are captured.
Local sequence IDs preserve callback order within connection sessions.
acceptance_threshold: monotonic local sequence and no unaccounted sequence gaps

criterion_description: Connection open, close, reconnect and subscription-boundary events are recorded.
acceptance_threshold: connection/session ledger exists and reconciles to ticks

criterion_description: Dropped, duplicate, stale and out-of-order message diagnostics are persisted.
acceptance_threshold: drop/duplicate/stale counters are present per symbol/session/day

criterion_description: Exchange, receive and collector monotonic timestamps are documented and validated.
acceptance_threshold: timestamp provenance and ordering checks pass

criterion_description: Raw callback order is compacted without resampling or event loss.
acceptance_threshold: row counts and ordering reconcile raw files to compact parquet
